/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/turtle_controller/libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/turtle_controller/msg/_robot_status_s.c.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/turtle_controller/msg/_robot_cmd_s.c.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/turtle_controller/msg/_directional_distance_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aula-robotica/ros_ws/build/turtle_controller:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libturtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
